short_definition: A first-class scenario matrix for end-to-end tests across runtime origin, surface host, MCP usage, and artifacts.
description: E2EScenarioContract makes end-to-end test scenarios explicit so the operator can distinguish local and Cloudflare origins, attached surfaces, projection paths, operator-admission paths, and expected proof artifacts without relying on scattered ad hoc test names.
boundaries: Not a specific test runner invocation.

authority.notes: The runtime concepts chapter already motivates explicit scenario coverage across local and Cloudflare surfaces.

examples: local runtime -> local surface; cloudflare runtime -> web surface
counterexamples: a raw list of test file names with no scenario axes

confidence.basis: The repo already has a broad mix of runtime and projection tests, but the scenario matrix is still implicit.
